title: 70 PCS Tetra Tower Balance Game, Team Tower Stacking Game for Kids & Adults Party Game, Swing Stack Balance Toy Perfect for Family Games, Travel, Gifts for Kids Boys Girls
features: Family Fun for All Ages: Boost mental development, hand-eye coordination, and focus with this vibrant stacking game! Perfect for kids, teens, and adults, it sparks laughter and bonding as a 2+ player icebreaker or parent-child interactive toy.

Balancing Team Challenge: Unplug and bond! Players collaborate to stack colorful blocks, enhancing concentration, patience, and social skills. Ideal for open-ended play, family nights, or friendly competitions.

Party & Social Icebreaker: Elevate gatherings with this lively drinking game or conversation starter! A hit at Christmas, birthdays, holidays, and themed parties, it guarantees laughter and unforgettable memories.
Safe & Durable ABS Design: Non-toxic, paint-free ABS blocks eliminate peeling risks (unlike wooden sets). Sturdy construction ensures long-lasting play for endless creative adventures.
Complete Creative Play Set: Includes 70 multicolor blocks (blue/red/green/yellow/orange), 1 base (4.2x4.4 30 draw cards, and 2 DIY cards for customizable rules and endless fun!

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎Boost mental development, hand-eye coordination, focus, concentration, patience, and social skills
